name: Fresh Asparagus with Lemon Butter Sauce
recipeInstructions:
1. Select fresh asparagus for crispness and young tender pencil-sized stalks are ideal.
2. Wash asparagus under cold running water.
3. Snap off the lower end of each stalk with your fingers. Let the stalk break where it wants to.
4. Cook the remaining tender portion: Young tender stalks can be cooked in a steamer for 5-7 minutes, more mature stalks for 7-10 minutes. Do not overcook asparagus, as it will lose flavor and nutrients.
5. Prepare the lemon butter sauce by combining butter, lemon juice, parsley, salt, and Tabasco Sauce in a small saucepan. Heat until hot, but do not boil.
6. Pour the heated sauce over the cooked asparagus and serve.
